title: ficus obscura var. scaberrima
intro: Ficus obscura var. scaberrima, also known as the scabrous fig, is a variety of the Ficus obscura species, native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Ficus obscura var. scaberrima has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves, roots, or bark, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for consumption.
